task_objective: Ensure Syncthing lifecycle monitoring works before the QAM panel has mounted by hydrating persisted settings at plugin startup.
tests_added: GameLifecycleController hydrates persisted settings before deciding whether to start the post-game watch
Static composition-root assertions for startup settings hydration before lifecycle start
design_decisions: Register lifecycle notifications immediately so startup events are not missed.
Await one shared settings-hydration promise inside lifecycle handlers before reading auto_sync_enabled.
Do not require QAM mount or eager game-list refresh; post-game Syncthing monitoring already tolerates stale tracking state.
Do not overwrite settings if another path populated the shared store while startup hydration was in flight.
Treat startup hydration failure as non-fatal and preserve local backup behavior.

results.red_test: Confirmed the cold-start lifecycle test failed because ensureStateReady was never called.
results.environment_note: Python emitted an existing non-fatal _virtualenv.pth warning from /tmp/sdh_ludusavi/.venv.
